user.title: Connect to Memgraph
user.description: Enter the connection details for your local Memgraph instance.

reconfigure.title: Update Memgraph connection
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your local Memgraph instance.

hassio_confirm.title: Memgraph add-on discovered
hassio_confirm.description: Home Assistant found the Memgraph add-on running. Confirm the connection details below.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Memgraph. Check the host/port and that Memgraph is running.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the username and password.

schema_version_mismatch.title: Ontology schema version mismatch
schema_version_mismatch.description: The ontology schema found in Memgraph (version {found_version}) does not match the version expected by this integration ({expected_version}). The integration will not load and no changes have been made to the graph. Resolve this manually (for example, restore a compatible backup or run a documented migration) before reloading the integration.

sustained_connection_failure.title: Ontology cannot reach Memgraph
sustained_connection_failure.description: The ontology integration has failed to synchronize with Memgraph {attempts} times in a row. Check that the local Memgraph service is running and reachable from Home Assistant. This issue will clear automatically once a synchronization succeeds.

rebuild.name: Rebuild
rebuild.description: Clears integration-generated graph data and rebuilds the entire ontology from current Home Assistant registries.

resync.name: Resync
resync.description: Re-reads Home Assistant registries and merges changes into the graph without deleting existing data.

sync_entity.name: Sync entity
sync_entity.description: Refreshes a single entity and its direct relationships in the graph.

validate.name: Validate
validate.description: Checks graph consistency and schema version without writing any changes. Evaluates all validation categories and records findings; does not run automatically after resync/rebuild.

query.name: Query
query.description: Runs a read-only Cypher query against the ontology graph. Write-intent queries are rejected before execution.

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return (default 100, maximum 1000).

refresh_semantics.name: Refresh semantics
refresh_semantics.description: Re-runs semantic classification for one entity, or for all entities if none is given.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: If provided, re-run classification for only this entity.

export_overrides.name: Export overrides
export_overrides.description: Exports all user-managed semantic overrides as a versioned JSON payload.

import_overrides.name: Import overrides
import_overrides.description: Imports a previously-exported overrides payload. Fails closed on any unsupported version or invalid entry.

payload.name: Payload
payload.description: A payload previously produced by Export overrides.

init.title: Update Memgraph connection
init.description: Update the connection details for your local Memgraph instance.

data.auto_classify: Automatically classify entities into semantic types
